message:
Add KubeStellar Console to Kubernetes & Infrastructure section (#543)

Adds [KubeStellar Console](https://github.com/kubestellar/console) to
the Kubernetes & Infrastructure section under Operations.

KubeStellar Console is a multi-cluster Kubernetes dashboard that
includes a guided [OpenFGA install
mission](https://github.com/kubestellar/console-kb/blob/master/solutions/cncf-install/install-openfga.json)
with step-by-step Helm install, verification, and troubleshooting.

Per request in
https://github.com/openfga/openfga/issues/2985#issuecomment-4077274985.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
